name: fireflies-data-handling
description: Handle Fireflies.ai transcript data: export formats, PII redaction, retention policies, and compliance. Use when exporting transcripts, implementing data redaction, configuring retention, or ensuring GDPR/CCPA compliance. Trigger with phrases like "fireflies data", "fireflies PII", "fireflies GDPR", "fireflies data retention", "fireflies privacy", "fireflies export".
